Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril shares some of his favorite mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how versatile phyllo dough is as he makes both sweet and savory dishes.
Video.title: The Magic of Phyllo

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril shares the virtues of southern caviar, proving it can be both accessible and sustainable: Emeril's Grilled Shrimp with Caviar Butter.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and Lindsey Brower and Nan Wallis create a meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Dallas Cowboys superfan Jesse Prado creates Tex-Mex barbecue with a Louisiana kick.
Video.title: Dallas

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos take inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: Crawfish Egg Rolls with Hot Sesame Drizzle, Crawfish Imperial, Crawfish Burgers, Fried Crawfish Tails with Olive Salad
Video.title: Crawfish Season

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Miami Dolphins superfan Seth Farmer and Julia Thompson inspire Emeril's tailgating creations.
Video.title: Miami

Video.summary: Atlanta Falcons superfan Thomas Dunn draws from his city's Southern delicacies.
Video.title: Atlanta

Video.summary: Tennessee Titans (and Southern home cooking) superfans Isaiah Washington and Jameson Greer.
Video.title: Nashville

Video.summary: Portobello Mushrooms with Pasta and Tomato Sauce
Video.title: Pasta

Video.summary: Kale and Chorizo Soup, New England Clam Chowder
Video.title: Kale Soup

Video.summary: Fish and Vinegar Chips, Fish and Chips with Tartar Sauce
Video.title: Fish and Chips

Video.summary: Corn Crab Bisque, Roasted Pepper Cream Soup
Video.title: Cream Soups

Video.summary: Seafood Okra Gumbo, Chicken Sausage Gumbo
Video.title: Gumbo

Video.summary: Basic Rice Pilaf, Jambalaya with Smoked Sausage or Chicken, Leftover Rice with Fried Vegetables
Video.title: Rice

Video.summary: Pork Chops, Mexican Mole Sauce, Tamarind Glaze, Caramelized Sweet Potatoes
Video.title: Pork Chops

Video.summary: Plain Beignet, Crawfish Beignet, Banana Beignet
Video.title: Beignets

Video.summary: Ravioli, Pot Stickers, Gnocchi
Video.title: Dumplings

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril's Bellini, Antipasto Platter, Fresh Pasta with Shiitake Mushrooms, Seafood Risotto, Harry's Bar Cake
Video.title: Venice

Video.summary: Garlic Aioli, Garlicky Bread Soup, Spicy Garlic Bread, Sauteed Frog Legs.
Video.title: Garlic Galore

Video.summary: Hot Sauce, Duck Confit Rellenos, Corn and Tomato Salsa, Piri Piri Lobster.
Video.title: Hot, Hot Chilies

Video.summary: Pickled Herring Casserole, Smoked Scallop Sandwich, Filet of Sole Escabeche
Video.title: Emeril's Seafood Shack

Video.summary: Coconut Tempura Shrimp with Mango Chutney, Pineapple Cream Pie with Coconut Crust, Deep-Fried Mahi-Mahi, Macadamia Nut Fingers
Video.title: Emeril's Tropical Fruit Stand
